task: Implement the next slice: Withdrawal Decline Notified (withdrawaldeclinenotified)

changes.description: New messages function for WithdrawalDeclineNotified event — emits an idempotency message keyed by transactionId for the NotifyWithdrawalDecline consumer
Imported withdrawalDeclineNotifiedMessages and wired it to the WithdrawalDeclineNotified event type in the stream factory (previously registered with no messages handler)
New ProjectionConfig for the 'withdrawal declines' read model — listens to WithdrawalDeclinedNotification messages and UPSERTs decline records keyed by account
Projection slice tests: create decline record, update existing record on replay, multiple accounts tracked independently
Imported withdrawalDeclinesSlice and added it to the projectionSlices array so it is registered at startup
